title: Inference-run workstation
description: Configure type = INFERENCE_RUN for inference harness dispatch through an INFERENCE_WORKER backend.
openingSummary: INFERENCE_RUN is the WorkstationType for one-shot inference harness dispatch. Set type to INFERENCE_RUN when a step must run a bounded model operation such as TTS or ASR through an INFERENCE_WORKER, and choose behavior independently for STANDARD, REPEATER, CRON, or POLLER scheduling.

howToUse.title: How To Use
howToUse.body: Author a workstation with type INFERENCE_RUN and bind an INFERENCE_WORKER. Choose behavior for the scheduling axis you need — STANDARD for fire-once dispatch, REPEATER for change-triggered loops, CRON for schedules, or POLLER for long-lived poller ingress. Wire inputs plus outputs, onContinue, onRejection, and onFailure so inference outcomes route correctly. Do not set classificationRoutes, openCodeAgent, promptFile, or operation bindings that belong to other WorkstationType families. Choose AGENT_RUN for agent loops, SCRIPT_RUN for scripts, or CLASSIFIER_WORKSTATION for label routes. INFERENCE_RUN is not a scheduling behavior and is not AGENT_RUN — keep agent loops on AGENT_RUN and model-invoke operations on MODEL_INVOKE.

schemaReference.title: Schema reference
schemaReference.body: The embed below shows the live Workstation base definition with INFERENCE_RUN overlay applicability. INFERENCE_RUN has no selected exclusive fields. Excluded fields belong to other WorkstationType families or to CRON scheduling and must not appear on this type. Open the full Factory schema reference for exhaustive field lookup rather than copying contract text into this page.

examples.title: Examples
examples.body: Use the minimal valid example when starting an INFERENCE_RUN workstation with behavior STANDARD. The misuse example borrows classificationRoutes from CLASSIFIER_WORKSTATION — that field is excluded from INFERENCE_RUN.

links.companionIntro: INFERENCE_RUN requires an INFERENCE_WORKER companion and is compatible with every published WorkstationKind. Bind the inference worker, then choose scheduling on the behavior axis.
links.misuseNote: classificationRoutes belongs on CLASSIFIER_WORKSTATION. Keep INFERENCE_RUN on identity, worker binding, inputs, outputs, and routing fields only.
